Allowed only:
• Digits: 0-9
• Operators: +, -, *, /
• Brackets: (, )
• Decimal point: .
• Variable: x
• Functions: pow, sqrt, abs, cos, sin, tan, acos, asin, atan, exp, log

Examples: 3.14, 2+3*(x-1), sin(x), sqrt(x+1)

Modbus.ExceptionCode1: The function code received in the query is not recognized or allowed.
Modbus.ExceptionCode2: The data address specified in the query is not available.
Modbus.ExceptionCode3: The value contained in the query data field is invalid.
Modbus.ExceptionCode4: An unrecoverable error occurred while the slave was attempting to perform the requested action.
Modbus.ExceptionCode5: The slave accepted the request and is processing it, but this requires a long duration. This response prevents a timeout error on the master.
Modbus.ExceptionCode6: The slave is busy processing a command. The master should retry later when the slave is free.
Modbus.ExceptionCode7: The slave cannot perform the program function specified in the request. This code is returned for unsuccessful program requests using functions 13 or 14. The master should request diagnostics or error information from the slave.
Modbus.ExceptionCode8: The slave detected a parity check error while reading extended memory. The master may retry later, but hardware service is usually required.
Modbus.ExceptionCode10: Gateway is misconfigured or overloaded with requests.
Modbus.ExceptionCode11: Target slave is not present on the network or did not respond.
